title: Oulu, North Ostrobothnia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Oulu, North Ostrobothnia: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Oulu is a city in North Ostrobothnia with a population of 207,000. A northern tech hub known for its startup scene, Oulu University, and unique Air Guitar World Championships.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
